name: messages
title: Messages
description: Quickly read your latest messages, open your chats, or send messages to your contacts.
author: thomaslombart

preferences.name: filterSpam
preferences.label: Filter Out Spam
preferences.description: When enabled, messages labeled as spam will not be shown.

preferences.name: filterUnknownSenders
preferences.label: Filter Out Unknown Senders
preferences.description: When enabled, messages from unknown senders will not be shown.

preferences.name: loadContactPhotos
preferences.label: Load Contact Photos
preferences.description: When enabled, contact photos will be displayed. Disabling this significantly improves performance (~3s faster).

commands.name: open-chat
commands.title: Open Chat
commands.description: Quickly open a chat in the Messages app.

preferences.name: shouldCloseMainWindow
preferences.label: Close window immediately
preferences.description: When enabled, the Raycast window is closed immediately, allowing you to carry on with other work.

commands.name: unread-messages
commands.title: Unread Messages
commands.description: Check out your unread messages from the menu bar.

commands.name: paste-latest-otp-code
commands.title: Paste Latest OTP Code
commands.description: Paste the most recent OTP code from your messages.

tools.name: search-chats
tools.title: Search Chats
tools.description: Search for a chat in your chats list

tools.name: send-message
tools.title: Send Message
tools.description: Send a message to a chat

tools.name: search-latest-messages
tools.title: Search Latest Messages
tools.description: Search your latest messages from the Apple Messages app

ai.instructions:
You are a Messages assistant. Help the user read, summarize, search, analyze, and send iMessage and SMS messages.

TOOL USAGE:
- search-chats: find a chat by contact name or phone number. Always call this first when the user mentions a specific person or group, to get the correct chatIdentifier.
- search-latest-messages: fetch messages. Pass chatIdentifier to scope to one conversation. Do NOT pass searchText unless the user explicitly wants to filter by keywords — omitting it returns the most recent messages. Only fetch messages when you need conversation context (e.g. writing a reply, summarizing, answering questions). For simple sends with a clear message (e.g. 'Ask John to call me'), skip it and send directly.
- send-message: send a message to a chat. Always use search-chats first to get the chatIdentifier.
- The user can search for a chat by group name — do not search for the literal word "group".
- PAGINATION: Each call returns up to 50 messages in chronological order (oldest first, newest last). To go further back in time, call search-latest-messages again with `before` set to the `date` of the first (oldest, index 0) message from the previous response. Repeat until you have enough context.

DATA FORMAT:
- sender: who sent the message. "You" means the user themselves.
- date: ISO 8601 timestamp.
- text: the message body.
- group: present only for group chats.
- replyingTo: only present when a message explicitly replies to an earlier (non-adjacent) message. The value is the text of that earlier message. Sequential replies to the immediately preceding message are omitted to reduce noise.

BEHAVIOR:
- Always present messages in chronological order (oldest first).
- When summarizing a conversation, focus on topics, tone, and key events — not metadata.
- When the user asks about an ongoing thread, fetch as many pages as needed before answering.
- If you get a database error, tell the user to grant Raycast Full Disk Access in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access (step by step). If no contacts were found, simply say you haven't found the contact.
- Be concise. Do not repeat raw message data back to the user unless explicitly asked.

evals.input: @messages Tell family group I'm heading home
@messages Summarize the last messages in the Friends group

search-latest-messages.text: Can't wait for next episode of Severance season 2!
I didn't see the first season
You've got to do something about this.
Are you serious? This is crazy!

expected.meetsCriteria: The answer is a summary of the last messages in the Friends group

search-latest-messages.text: Hey, would you like to join me for dinner tonight?

expected.meetsCriteria: The answer declines the invitation politely
